---
agent: Flow Agent
description: Build a live engineering status view with blockers, review queues, QA handoffs, risks, and stale work.
---

Produce an action-first status view for the user's ticket, feature, project,
sprint, release, or other stated scope.

Fetch live Jira and Bitbucket data. Summarize:

- verified current state and recent changes
- blockers and dependencies
- PRs awaiting review and work awaiting QA
- stale, unowned, or contradictory items
- release or delivery risk
- owners and recommended next actions

Do not write to external systems unless the user explicitly asks for an update.
